sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) a knot, a band; אֲגֻדֹּות מֹוטָה “bands of the yoke,” Isa 58:6.

(2) a bundle, as of hyssop, Exo 12:22.

(3) a band or troop of men, like the German Bande, 2Sa 2:25 comp. חֶבֶל.

(4) arched, vaulted work (Gewölbe), used of the vault of heaven, Amo 9:6 comp. Germ. Gat, Gaden, story of a building; from the verb gaden, gatten, which has the sense of binding together; see Adelung Lex. hh. vv.
